title: Aneurysm Detector
description: Award-winning convolutional neural network using MaskRCNN to detect aortic aneurysms from ecography video, with 3D model generation and a GUI for visualization.

title: Draculin
description: Finalist at BitsXLaMarató 2023 — a mobile health app combining an AI chatbot with computer vision to support menstrual health tracking and early issue detection.

title: Data Governance Platform
description: Enterprise data governance solution integrating Informatica, AWS, and Azure services for large-scale data management.

title: Real-Time KPI Dashboards
description: Dynamic dashboards for monitoring business metrics and KPIs in real time, driving strategic decision-making at an insurance company.

title: Predictive Analytics Pipeline
description: End-to-end ETL and predictive analytics pipeline that improved report accuracy by 20% through automated data quality processes.
